diagnosis.differential_diagnosis: Aspiration pneumonia, mycoplasma infection, viral infection, bacterial infection, fungal infection, mycobacterial infection
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The presence of consolidation in the retrocardiac area on chest radiograph suggested pneumonic processes, coupled with respiratory symptoms and a recent history of similar illness in the patient's husband. Laboratory findings, including BAL, indicated an acute infection while the dependency of the consolidations suggests aspiration pneumonia as a possible factor. Other infectious processes were also considered in the differential.
